event1.text: The black box contains everything. The official reports were altered. Not edited. Rewritten.

event1.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 01
event1.content:
21:09 Crew Assembly
21:11 Unauthorized Access Request
21:12 Internal Channel Opened

event1.text: Do not trust those records. They are corrupted. And before Maya says I always say that when I am hiding something... This time I am saying it because the recorder wants you to believe it.

event1.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 02
event1.content:
21:13 Emergency Lockdown
21:14 Manual Override Requested
21:14 Override Source: INTERNAL

backgroundEvent3.text: I hate when the haunted recorder starts being encouraging.

event1.title: BLACK BOX FRAGMENT 03
event1.content:
21:15 Voice Authorization Accepted
Identity Hidden
Authorization Phrase: OPEN THE STATION

event1.text: Recovered fragments share matching audio signature. Voice sample integrity: 43%
Someone opened the station. From the inside. That is how Alpha started.
Hale wanted the station sealed. Whatever he became after that... I do not know.
I thought you would ask that. And I wish I could answer without being afraid of the answer.

event0.title: VOICE SAMPLE
event0.content:
VOICE SAMPLE
CORRUPTED
RECOVERY POSSIBLE

Recovered phrase:
"OPEN THE STATION"

event1.text: Signature mismatch. Try again. The answer is in the suit ID, the pod records, and the medical scan.

event2.title: VOICE ANALYSIS RESULT
event2.content:
MATCH FOUND

IDENTITY:
NOAH VOSS

AUTHORIZED COMMAND:
OPEN THE STATION

Timestamp: 21:15

event1.text: That is impossible. I was already in the pod. I remember the lock engaging.
If that voice was mine... Then who opened the station?
